'''Christopher Perkins''' (born [[February 29]], [[1960s#1968|1968]]) was the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' design manager, who edited some of the ''Star Wars Roleplaying Game'' supplements, as well as [[Star Wars Insider 55|''Star Wars Insider'' 55]] and the [[Star Wars Gamer Special Edition|preview]] issue of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine.

{{Bio-stub}}

==Sources==
*[[Star Wars Insider 55|''Star Wars Insider'' 55]]
*''[[Zygerrian Takedown]]''
*''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''
*''[[Tempest Feud]]''
*''[[Star Wars Gamer Special Edition]]''
*''[[Jedi Academy Training Manual]]''
